lesson: c2-l05 / Getting Started with ChatGPT for Teachers
title: Getting Started with ChatGPT

scenes.name: Title
scenes.text: Getting started with <emphasis>ChatGPT</emphasis>. [pause] The tool most teachers meet first — used as a real professional instrument.

scenes.name: What it is
scenes.text: ChatGPT is a conversational AI built by OpenAI on top of a large language model. [pause] It does not look up answers — it generates fresh text every time.

scenes.name: Setup
scenes.text: Free at <emphasis>chat.openai.com</emphasis>. [pause] Sign in with email or single sign-on. The free tier is enough for most teacher workflows.

scenes.name: Interface tour
scenes.text: A simple interface — past chats on the left, the conversation in the middle, your text box at the bottom. [pause] At the top, you can switch models.

scenes.name: Workflow
scenes.text: Every useful prompt follows the same shape. [pause] Set context — subject, grade, objective. Give the task. Read critically. Iterate.

scenes.name: Four starters
scenes.text: Four high-value first workflows. [pause] Lesson drafts. Differentiated texts. Practice questions. Rewriting your own materials for clarity.

scenes.name: Privacy
scenes.text: <emphasis>Never</emphasis> paste student names, identifying details, or confidential school documents. [pause] Anonymise first. Everything you type leaves your device.

scenes.name: Build the habit
scenes.text: Pick two recurring tasks. Use ChatGPT for them every week. [pause] Save the prompts that work. That small library becomes your toolkit.
